channel.title: Visit on Jan Heiland
channel.description: Recent content in Visit on Jan Heiland

item.title: Visit: University Passau
item.description:
Meeting with the group of Fabian Wirth and Andrii Mironchenko.

I will give a talk on

Robust control for compensation of linearization and discretization errors in stabilization of incompressible flows

in the seminar, 1PM, on July 3rd.
